name: MIX & MATCH
overview: "MIX & MATCH" is a 9-episode reality show featuring Team B from "WIN: Who Is Next" alongside three new trainees. With B.I, Bobby, and Jinhwan confirmed as iKON’s core members, the others fight to secure a spot in the final lineup.

trailers.title: Mnet [MIX & MATCH] Ep.01 티저: iKON의 주인공은 누가 될 것인가!
